violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishments RICFSM has left establishment. Establishment it to apply for a RICFSM. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment must obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The handwashing sink in the kitchen was not operable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was not operable. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
